name: Blackwing - Vayu the Emblem of Honor
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＢＦ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ブラックフェザー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>大</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>旆</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のヴァーユ
desc: This face-up card on the field cannot be used as a Synchro Material. If this card is in the GY: You can target 1 non-Tuner "Blackwing" monster in your GY; banish both this card and that target, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Blackwing" Synchro Monster from your Extra Deck whose Level equals the total Levels of the banished monsters, but its effects are negated.
mnst_eff: This face-up card on the field cannot be used as a Synchro Material. If this card is in the GY: You can target 1 non-Tuner "Blackwing" monster in your GY; banish both this card and that target, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Blackwing" Synchro Monster from your Extra Deck whose Level equals the total Levels of the banished monsters, but its effects are negated.
eff: This face-up card on the field cannot be used as a Synchro Material. If this card is in the GY: You can target 1 non-Tuner "Blackwing" monster in your GY; banish both this card and that target, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Blackwing" Synchro Monster from your Extra Deck whose Level equals the total Levels of the banished monsters, but its effects are negated.

mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Cannot be used as a Synchro Material
